# virtuacloud_projects (Data Source)

List all projects for the authenticated Virtua.Cloud account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) List of projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_servers_count` (String) Number of cloud servers in project.
- `created_at` (String) Project creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Project description.
- `domains_count` (String) Number of domains in project.
- `environment` (String) Project environment (e.g. production, staging).
- `monthly_cloud_usage` (String) Monthly cloud usage.
- `monthly_cloud_usage_estimate` (String) Estimated monthly cloud usage.
- `name` (String) Project name.
- `uuid` (String) Project UUID.
